parameters.name: ForceMount
parameters.description: When true, this content is always rendered into the DOM (with the hidden attribute when the collapsible is closed) instead of being unmounted. Use when child state must survive collapsing. Default false preserves the original unmount behaviour.

mdSummary:
# Collapsible

Single expandable region with animated height transition.

**Package:** `Lumeo` · **Category:** Navigation
**Docs:** https://lumeo.nativ.sh/components/collapsible

## Parameters
| Owner | Name | Type | Default | Description |
|---|---|---|---|---|
| Collapsible | ChildContent | `RenderFragment?` | `` |  |
| Collapsible | Open | `bool` | `` |  |
| Collapsible | OpenChanged | `EventCallback<bool>` | `` |  |
| Collapsible | IsOpen | `bool` | `` |  |
| Collapsible | IsOpenChanged | `EventCallback<bool>` | `` |  |
| Collapsible | Class | `string?` | `` |  |
| Collapsible | AdditionalAttributes | `Dictionary<string, object>?` | `` |  |
| CollapsibleContent | Context | `Collapsible.CollapsibleContext` | `default!` |  |
| CollapsibleContent | ChildContent | `RenderFragment?` | `` |  |
| CollapsibleContent | ForceMount | `bool` | `` | When true, this content is always rendered into the DOM (with the hidden attribute when the collapsible is closed) instead of being unmounted. Use when child state must survive collapsing. Default false preserves the original unmount behaviour. |
| CollapsibleContent | Class | `string?` | `` |  |
| CollapsibleContent | AdditionalAttributes | `Dictionary<string, object>?` | `` |  |
| CollapsibleTrigger | Context | `Collapsible.CollapsibleContext` | `default!` |  |
| CollapsibleTrigger | ChildContent | `RenderFragment?` | `` |  |
| CollapsibleTrigger | Class | `string?` | `` |  |
| CollapsibleTrigger | AdditionalAttributes | `Dictionary<string, object>?` | `` |  |

## Slots
- `ChildContent` (Collapsible) — RenderFragment slot
- `ChildContent` (CollapsibleContent) — RenderFragment slot
- `ChildContent` (CollapsibleTrigger) — RenderFragment slot

## Events
- `OpenChanged` (`EventCallback<bool>`)
- `IsOpenChanged` (`EventCallback<bool>`)

## Sub-components
- `CollapsibleContent`, `CollapsibleTrigger`

## Cascading values it expects
- `Context` (`Collapsible.CollapsibleContext`)

## Services it injects
- (none)

## Keyboard
- `Enter` — HandleKeyDown handles Enter in CollapsibleTrigger.razor
- ` ` — HandleKeyDown handles   in CollapsibleTrigger.razor

## Example
```razor
<Collapsible />
```

## CSS variables
`--color-ring`, `--radius`

## Files
- `UI/Collapsible/Collapsible.razor`
- `UI/Collapsible/CollapsibleContent.razor`
- `UI/Collapsible/CollapsibleTrigger.razor`
